other_observers: John Vanderpoel; Found by John Vanderpoel, seen by many others
specific_location: John Vanderpoel's residence, 7583 Estate Circle, Niwot.
description: Red-gorgeted hummingbird with black auriculars and black all the way up to the eye above the red gorget feathers. Small white postocular spot. Moderate-sized hummingbird with moderate-length bill, very slightly downcurved. Back metallic green, belly grayish green, breast and upper flanks nearly white. Vent area nearly white. Tail dark, nearly black.Behaviors: Visited residential feeder several times, aggressive towards Calliope Hummingbirds. Perched briefly in a tree nearby feeders.Call: not heardPlumage: adult
